data.title: SEALSQ successfully validates QS7001 Quantum Resistant Hardware Platform; chip to launch in Q4 2025 for first customers.
data.description: In Geneva, Switzerland on July 17, 2025, it was announced that a new chip featuring post-quantum security measures is projected to be released in the fourth quarter of 2025. This development is significant as it marks the integration of advanced security features into designs, potentially enhancing data protection for users. The chip is anticipated to cater to the needs of tech-savvy customers seeking robust security solutions in the rapidly evolving digital landscape.

data.title: Altimetrik opens ALTI Lab in Bengaluru, India for AI solutions with lab-to-factory model; aims to scale adoption globally.
data.description: Altimetrik, an AI-first data and digital engineering solutions company, has inaugurated ALTI Lab™, a specialized center in Bengaluru, India, dedicated to expedited prototyping and applied innovation. This initiative aims to advance the company's AI-first strategy. ALTI Lab™ functions on a lab-to-factory concept, focusing on creating high-quality AI solutions for enterprises and expanding their usage in client projects and internal operations through collaborative development, seamless deployment, and strategic talent utilization.

data.title: Paubox awards 2025 Kahikina Scholarships to Native Hawaiian students pursuing STEM degrees; $1000 yearly to 17 recipients.
data.description: Announcement was made in Honolulu today regarding the 2025 recipients of Paubox Kahikina Scholarship, aimed at motivating Native Hawaiians to enter STEM fields. Recipients receive $1,000 annually until graduation. This year's group, the largest so far with 17 recipients, includes graduates from high schools in Hawaiʻi, Nevada, and Texas. The scholarship program is now in its seventh year.

data.title: Global ECG Sensor Patches Market to reach $2.32 billion by 2032, growing at 12.0% CAGR from $0.95 billion in 2024.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, the worldwide market for ECG Sensor Patches experienced significant growth, increasing from US$0.95 billion in 2024 to US$1.05 billion in 2025. It is anticipated to continue this upward trend with a strong compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.0% from 2025 to 2032. This growth trajectory is predicted to result in a market value of US$2.32 billion by 2032.

data.title: Home-visit programs in Colorado and Texas honored for advancing early childhood education, empowering parents; announced on July 17, 2025.
data.description: Innovative local programs in New York are enhancing early literacy and numeracy skills by empowering parents to act as their child's first teacher. These efforts are aimed at preparing children for a successful transition into school. One of the initiatives, Home Instruction for Parents of Preschool Youngsters (HIPPY), has been particularly effective in this regard. This approach, implemented on July 17, 2025, emphasizes the importance of parental involvement in a child's education. The program aims to improve outcomes for young learners and equip them with the necessary skills for academic success.

data.title: Service Corporation International will release Q2 2025 financial results on July 30, 2025, followed by a conference call on July 31, 2025.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Service Corporation International (NYSE: SCI) disclosed plans to release its financial report for the second quarter of 2025 on July 30, 2025. The company is set to conduct a conference call with SCI Management on July 31, 2025.

data.title: Graduation Alliance acquires EdisonLearning's school partnerships, expanding online education access nationwide.
data.description: In Salt Lake City on July 17, 2025, Graduation Alliance announced the acquisition of the management rights for EdisonLearning's school partnerships. EdisonLearning, an online education solutions provider, has been taken over to enhance access to flexible, nontraditional pathways for high school graduation. This move aims to provide more options for students to reach graduation milestones.

data.title: Opti9 in Garden City, NY, achieves AWS MSP designation, becoming an AWS Managed Service Provider Partner.
data.description: Opti9, based in Garden City, New York, has received recognition as a designated partner in the Amazon Web Services (AWS) Managed Service Provider (MSP) Partner Program. This achievement highlights Opti9's expertise in managing AWS services and positions them as a trusted provider for clients seeking cloud solutions.

data.title: "2025 Contact Center as a Service report: NICE, Genesys, Amazon Connect, and Five9 lead with global rankings by seats and revenue."
data.description: In Dublin, the "2025 Contact Center as a Service Worldwide Market Share Report" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection. This report serves as a crucial tool for vendors, investors, analysts, and individuals seeking insights into the competitive landscape of the sector. It offers valuable information on vendor market share by revenue and number of seats, geographical distribution, adoption rates, and the current as well as the estimated total addressable market (TAM). Known for its authoritative and thorough analysis, this fifth annual edition provides essential data for industry stakeholders.

data.title: Provenir named a Strong Performer in 2025 AI Decisioning Platforms Report by Forrester, rated against 18 criteria.
data.description: A company based in Parsippany, New Jersey, Provenir, specializing in AI risk decisioning software, has been acknowledged as a "Strong Performer" in the recent “The Forrester Wave™: AI Decisioning Platforms, Q2 2025” report. Among 15 leading AI decisioning platform providers evaluated against 18 criteria, assessing Current Offering, Strategy, and Customer Feedback, Provenir stood out in the analysis. The company's strategic emphasis on the complete credit decisioning lifecycle with prebuilt solutions was noted in the report.

data.title: Cryptosolo's new "One-Click Mining" service allows users to start earning daily passive income in Bitcoin & Dogecoin with just $15, no hardware or technical knowledge required. Key advantages include instant activation, smart mining allocation, zero hardware costs, and no environmental disruption.
data.description: In London, United Kingdom, on July 17, 2025, Cryptosolo, a prominent player in cloud cryptocurrency mining, has introduced its latest service called "One-Click Mining." For only $15, individuals can now easily enter cloud mining and start generating passive income daily in popular cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin (BTC) and Dogecoin (DOGE). This service eliminates the need for mining hardware, technical expertise, and any setup hassle. The key advantages of Cryptosolo's One-Click Mining include instant activation where users can register, pick a plan, and begin mining in seconds. The service also offers smart mining allocation, automatically optimizing for top-performing assets like BTC, DOGE, LTC, and SOL. Moreover, there are zero hardware costs involved, meaning no expenses on equipment, electricity, or maintenance. Additionally, there is no environmental disruption as it eliminates noise, heat, and space usage. Lastly, there are no technical barriers such as configuring wallets or managing. For further details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mateo Valdez's GSCG aims to transform education by empowering Gen Z students for real-world careers. Less than 30% feel prepared post-high school.
data.description: Less than 30% of high school students believe they are adequately prepared for careers post-graduation. In a recent episode of Disruption Interruption, Mateo Valdez, the founder of Gonzaga Sport Consulting Group (GSCG), discusses the innovative approach his student-led consultancy is taking to revolutionize education through practical, real-world experiences.
